evals.prompt: 프로젝트 문서를 업데이트해줘. CODEMAPS랑 HUMANMAPS 둘 다 갱신해줘.
evals.expected_output: detect_changes.mjs -> changes.json, extract_structure.mjs -> extracted_structure.json, CODEMAPS/INDEX.md, HUMANMAPS .html 생성
expectations: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for doc-update

evals.prompt: 백엔드 API 코드가 변경됐어. CODEMAPS만 부분 업데이트해줘
evals.expected_output: detect_changes.mjs로 변경 감지, 변경된 모듈만 extract_structure.mjs, CODEMAPS 부분 갱신
expectations: Summary mentions reading SKILL.md for doc-update
